name: 语音速记誊写员
description: 语音文件落入→离线转文字→存可检索文本+通知预览。v2: NLP提取待办→提醒事项

steps.description: Speech框架离线转写(零配置, 中文)

steps.args:
-c 'T=$(mac-speech-transcribe.sh "$LAST_FILE"); printf "## %s
%s

" "$(date +%F\ %T) $(basename "$LAST_FILE")" "$T" >> ~/Documents/语音速记/transcripts.md; osascript -e "display notification "${T:0:80}" with title "速记已誊写""'
steps.description: 追加到可检索总稿+系统通知预览
